name: dfmt_fetch
description: Fetch URL via sandbox. Use this instead of native WebFetch.

intent.description: STRONGLY RECOMMENDED. Short phrase about what you need (e.g. 'API rate limits', 'auth endpoints'). Filters response to matching excerpts; saves 70-90% tokens vs raw.

return.description: Output mode: 'auto' inlines small / summarizes large (default), 'raw' full inline, 'summary' summary+matches only, 'search' matches+vocab only.
